overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a scenic meadow at sunset, following a stream before crossing a wooden log bridge into a fortified forest area. The warm golden hour lighting illuminates the grasslands and wooden palisade structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open meadow path alongside flowing stream

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the grassy bank beside the flowing stream

entered.detail: Flowing water reflecting the golden sunset light
Lush green grass covering the ground
Colorful wildflowers including pink and yellow blooms
Dense pine forest forming the horizon boundary

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open meadow at golden hour, with a stream flowing on the right and wildflowers dotting the grass. The distant forest line is visible ahead under a warm sunset sky.

events.description: wooden palisade fence becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward the wooden fortification on the rocky hillside

entered.detail: Tall wooden stake fence forming a defensive perimeter
Stone pillar supporting the palisade entrance

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the wooden palisade, the terrain becomes rockier and the stream falls behind. The defensive wooden fence and stone gateposts become prominent features ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden log ramp entrance through palisade

events.description: beginning to ascend the wooden log ramp bridge
crossing over the logs through the palisade entrance

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbing the wooden log ramp to enter the fortified area

entered.detail: Horizontal logs laid to form a ramped bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the wooden log ramp that serves as a bridge through the palisade entrance. The wooden fence now flanks both sides as he crosses into the fortified area.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest path within palisade walls

events.description: entering darker shaded area under the tree canopy

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the dirt path through the forested enclosure

entered.detail: Tall pine trees creating a shaded canopy over the path

segments.scene_description: After crossing the logs, Geralt continues along a shaded forest path inside the palisade. The lighting becomes darker and more diffused under the dense pine canopy, with the wooden fence now receding into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched open meadow into the shaded interior of a fortified forest outpost. It begins with Geralt walking through golden-hour grasslands beside a flowing stream and scattered wildflowers, moving steadily toward a distant tree line. As the terrain becomes rockier and the stream falls away, the view shifts toward a defensive wooden palisade and stone gateposts that loom ahead. The camera then follows Geralt as he ascends a wooden log ramp, crossing the bridge while the fence flanks both sides of the path. Finally, the scene transitions into a darker, diffused light as he enters the fortified area, moving along a shaded forest path beneath a dense pine canopy.
